name: Honey Whole Wheat - No Fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water, honey, and yeast in the bread machine.
2. Add salt, whole-wheat flour, and bread flour to the bread machine.
3. Set the cycle to medium and run for the white setting with a timer.
4. This recipe is very tasty and has been tested by Reggie Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
5. The original recipe was published in "The Bread Machine CookBook III" by Donna Rathmell German.
